tasks.title: 01 - Init project and install deps
tasks.prompt: Run: npm init -y, then npm install express better-sqlite3 bcryptjs jsonwebtoken cors dotenv, then npm install -D typescript tsx nodemon @types/express @types/better-sqlite3 @types/bcryptjs @types/jsonwebtoken @types/cors.

tasks.title: 02 - Create tsconfig and .env
tasks.prompt: Create tsconfig.json targeting ES2020/commonjs with outDir dist and rootDir src. Create .env with PORT=3000 and JWT_SECRET=todoapp-secret-key. Create src/ and public/ directories.

tasks.title: 03 - Create src/index.ts
tasks.prompt: Create src/index.ts that starts an Express server on PORT from env (default 3000). Log startup message.

tasks.title: 04 - Create database schema
tasks.prompt: Create src/database.ts. Export getDb() that returns a better-sqlite3 singleton. Create data/ dir on first call. Migrate: users(id,username,email,password,created_at), todos(id,user_id,title,description,completed,created_at,updated_at), collaborators(id,todo_id,user_id,permission,created_at). Use WAL and foreign_keys=ON.

tasks.title: 05 - Create auth routes
tasks.prompt: Create src/auth.ts with Express Router. POST /api/auth/signup: validate username/email/password, hash with bcrypt (12 rounds), insert user, return JWT (7d) + user. POST /api/auth/login: find user by username, compare password, return JWT + user. Export createAuthMiddleware() that verifies JWT and attaches req.user.

tasks.title: 06 - Create todo CRUD routes
tasks.prompt: Create src/todos.ts with Express Router (auth required). GET /api/todos: list user's todos with collaborators. POST /api/todos: create todo. GET /api/todos/:id: get single todo. PUT /api/todos/:id: update title/description/completed. DELETE /api/todos/:id: delete todo (owner only).

tasks.title: 07 - Create collaboration routes
tasks.prompt: Create src/collaboration.ts with Express Router (auth required). POST /api/todos/:id/collaborators: add collaborator (owner only). GET /api/todos/:id/collaborators: list collaborators. DELETE /api/todos/:id/collaborators/:userId: remove collaborator. Export hasTodoPermission() and requireTodoPermission() helpers.

tasks.title: 08 - Create frontend HTML/CSS/JS
tasks.prompt: Create public/index.html with login/signup forms and app view (sidebar + detail). Create public/script.js with fetch-based API calls for auth, todo CRUD, and collaboration. Use vanilla JS, localStorage for JWT token. Clean modern design with inline CSS.

tasks.title: 09 - Final wiring and startup
tasks.prompt: Update src/index.ts to serve public/ as static files. Add CORS middleware. Mount all routers. Add 404 and error handlers. Create start.sh with mkdir -p data && npx tsx src/index.ts. Update package.json scripts.
